---
title: "ML & Autonomous Driving Notes"
description: "Deep-dive technical reports on machine learning and autonomous-driving systems — with executed notebooks, math, and runnable code."
toc: false
---

Working notes and survey reports on the systems behind modern autonomous driving and
machine learning: planning benchmarks, edge inference, and model compression. Each report
is written to be *mechanistic* — it explains why something works, not just that it does —
and most ship with an executed notebook or a runnable script.

The full collection of reports is published here — browse it all through the navbar
menus or the [complete list by category](#all-reports-by-category) below. The **Featured**
picks below are just a curated set of highlights. The companion notebooks and scripts that
accompany many reports are not rendered as site pages; you can [read them, and the source
for everything, on GitHub](https://github.com/morimori0456/ML_report).

## Featured

::: {.grid}

::: {.g-col-12 .g-col-md-6}
### [How NAVSIM Computes PDMS](autonomous_driving/driving_benchmarks/navsim_pdms_mechanism.md)
Why a *non-reactive, not-closed-loop* benchmark can still score collisions and
time-to-collision. Untangles the two meanings of "closed-loop," walks the LQR + bicycle
ego rollout, the gated score formula, and why a 4-second non-reactive window is a faithful
proxy — with a from-scratch PDMS calculator.

`autonomous driving` · `planning eval` · `NAVSIM / nuPlan`
:::

::: {.g-col-12 .g-col-md-6}
### [TensorRT Version Compatibility](edge_deployment/tensorrt_versioning.md)
Surviving TensorRT's dependency chain (driver → CUDA → cuDNN → TensorRT → engine). Why a
`.plan` built yesterday won't load today, how JetPack pins the whole stack, the version-
and hardware-compatible escape hatches, and a troubleshooting decision tree.

`edge deployment` · `TensorRT` · `Jetson`
:::

::: {.g-col-12 .g-col-md-6}
### [TensorRT INT8 Quantization on Jetson](edge_deployment/tensorrt_quantization_jetson.md)
A device-side recipe to quantize an AD-perception model to INT8: the affine mapping, what
the entropy calibrator actually computes, PTQ vs QAT, the build/benchmark commands, and
the Jetson Thor FP8/FP4 silent-fallback trap.

`edge deployment` · `quantization` · `INT8 / FP8`
:::

::: {.g-col-12 .g-col-md-6}
### [Knowledge Distillation — Complete Guide](distillation/knowledge_distillation.md)
The response / feature / relation families, from logit KD through FitNets, Attention
Transfer, FSP, NST, PKT, RKD, CRD, OFD and ReviewKD — with the adapters, transforms, and
loss-weighting that make them work in practice.

`model compression` · `distillation`
:::

:::

---

## All reports by category

### Autonomous Driving

- [Survey of Localization Technologies for Autonomous Driving](autonomous_driving/localization_tech.md)
- [Camera Extrinsic Calibration Complete Guide (Including Rectification)](autonomous_driving/camera_calibration/extrinsic_calibration.md)
- [DriveTransformer Complete Guide — Unified Transformer for Scalable End-to-End Autonomous Driving](autonomous_driving/drive_transformer/drive_transformer.md)
- [Modern Autonomous-Driving Benchmarks & Their Evaluation Metrics](autonomous_driving/driving_benchmarks/driving_benchmarks.md)
- [Running NAVSIM Yourself — Lightweight CPU-only PDMS](autonomous_driving/driving_benchmarks/navsim_hands_on.md)
- [How NAVSIM Computes PDMS](autonomous_driving/driving_benchmarks/navsim_pdms_mechanism.md)
- [mmEngine Complete Guide — OpenMMLab's Unified Training Engine](autonomous_driving/mmengine/mmengine_guide.md)
- [nuPlan Dataset & Devkit — The Closed-Loop Planning Benchmark](autonomous_driving/nuplan/nuplan_dataset.md)
- [VAD Dataloader Implementation Report (nuScenes Format)](autonomous_driving/VAD/dataloader.md)
- [VAD Ego Trajectory Computation Logic](autonomous_driving/VAD/ego_trajectory.md)
- [nuScenes Dataset Guide](autonomous_driving/VAD/nuscenes_dataset.md)

### Edge Deployment

- [TensorRT Version Compatibility](edge_deployment/tensorrt_versioning.md)
- [TensorRT INT8 Quantization on Jetson](edge_deployment/tensorrt_quantization_jetson.md)

### Distillation

- [Knowledge Distillation — Complete Guide](distillation/knowledge_distillation.md)
- [Advanced Knowledge Distillation — Practical Techniques for Production](distillation/advanced_kd_practical.md)
- [Distillation Methods — A Broader Survey](distillation/distillation_methods_survey.md)
- [Feature Distillation — Why Intermediate Features Beat Final Logits](distillation/feature_distillation_why.md)
- [Foundation Model Distillation — Leveraging Large Pretrained Models as Teachers](distillation/foundation_model_distillation.md)
- [Multi-Teacher Distillation — Combining Multiple Teachers into One Student](distillation/multi_teacher_distillation.md)
- [Self-Distillation — Why a Model Teaching Itself Gets Better](distillation/self_distillation.md)

### LLM

- [KV Cache Complete Guide](llm/kv_cache.md)
- [LoRA / QLoRA Complete Guide](llm/lora_qlora.md)
- [Domain-Specific LLM Fine-Tuning — LoRA in Practice on a Driving-Scenario Generator](llm/domain_finetune_driving.md)
- [LLM Fine-Tuning Methods — A Survey and Practical Map](llm/finetuning_methods_survey.md)

### Training & MLOps

- [Weight EMA — Exponential Moving Average of Model Weights](ema/weight_ema.md)
- [Experiment Tracking — TensorBoard & Weights & Biases (wandb)](experiment_tracking/experiment_tracking.md)
- [Building ML Training Infrastructure — Tools & Know-How](infrastructure/ml_training_infrastructure.md)

### Agentic Engineering

- [Loop Engineering — Building Autonomous AI Agent Systems](agentic_engineering/loop_engineering.md)
- [Loop Design Playbook — Real-World Cases to Your Own Autonomous Loops](agentic_engineering/loop_design_playbook.md)

---

*Comments are open at the bottom of each report. The source for every page is on
[GitHub](https://github.com/morimori0456/ML_report) — corrections and discussion welcome.*
